name: Spiritual Beast Rampengu
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ラムペンタ
desc: Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can banish 1 "Ritual Beast" monster from your Extra Deck and send 1 "Ritual Beast" monster with the same Type as that monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only Special Summon "Spiritual Beast Rampengu(s)" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can banish 1 "Ritual Beast" monster from your Extra Deck and send 1 "Ritual Beast" monster with the same Type as that monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only Special Summon "Spiritual Beast Rampengu(s)" once per turn.
eff: Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can banish 1 "Ritual Beast" monster from your Extra Deck and send 1 "Ritual Beast" monster with the same Type as that monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only Special Summon "Spiritual Beast Rampengu(s)" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
